title: Homelab Server Infrastructure
subtitle: Self-hosted 24/7 production environment
tech: macOS · pm2 · Cloudflare Tunnel · Custom Domain Routing · GitHub Automation
description: A repurposed Mac converted into a 24/7 home server, hosting multiple production services managed with pm2 process management and exposed securely to the public internet through a Cloudflare Tunnel with per-service subdomains under a custom domain. Includes GitHub-based automation to keep portfolio data in sync and restrictive CORS policies across self-hosted APIs.

title: FlowLedger
subtitle: Personal Finance Management Platform
tech: React · TypeScript · Node.js · Express · Prisma · PostgreSQL · JWT · Zod
description: A web-first personal finance platform for aggregating and understanding financial activity from a single dashboard, supporting shared expenses, debt tracking, bank integrations, and automated transaction imports. Built as an npm workspaces monorepo with a Prisma/PostgreSQL backend and a React frontend.

title: QuantLab
subtitle: Algorithmic Trading Strategy Lab
tech: React · TypeScript · Node.js · Express · Python · PostgreSQL
description: Full-stack platform for building, backtesting, and optimizing algorithmic trading strategies. Features a deterministic Python trading engine, historical backtesting, paper trading simulation, and a parameter optimizer that automatically evaluates multiple strategy configurations.

title: Real Value Marketing
subtitle: Lead Generation Website with CRM Integration
tech: React · TypeScript · Vite · Node.js · Express · Odoo CRM · Vercel · Railway
description: A high-conversion marketing website designed for B2B lead generation. Includes a custom Book a Call flow connected to Odoo CRM via a secure backend API.

title: React Minimal Handbook
subtitle: Interactive Guide to Core React Concepts
tech: React · TypeScript · Vite · Tailwind · WebSockets · REST APIs
description: Interactive learning application demonstrating React concepts such as components, hooks, Context API, and real-time data updates.

title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Landing Prediction
subtitle: End-to-end Data Science project with live interactive dashboard
tech: Python · Pandas · SQL · Scikit-learn · Plotly · Dash
description: Data science project predicting Falcon 9 landing success using API data, machine learning models, and a live interactive dashboard.

title: StudentOverflow
subtitle: Full-stack Q&A platform (StackOverflow clone)
description: Full-stack Q&A platform featuring authentication, voting, search, and image uploads.

title: AI Router & Ops Agent
subtitle: Self-hosted AI orchestration router with a Telegram-based Ops Agent
tech: Node.js · Claude Agent SDK · Telegram Bot API
description: Self-hosted orchestration service built on the Claude Agent SDK that routes AI-driven tasks and exposes a read-only Ops Agent through a Telegram bot for monitoring and managing production services remotely.

title: Many2many Razs Tags Widget (Odoo App)
subtitle: Odoo 19 Addon published on the official App Store
description: Custom Odoo widget rendering many2many relations as configurable modern tags.

title: Quote Builder Report Link (Odoo App)
subtitle: Odoo 18 Addon published on the official App Store
description: Production-ready Odoo module adding a direct report download button to the quotation form.

title: Job Scraper Dashboard
subtitle: Automated job board scraper with a review dashboard
tech: FastAPI · Selenium · Python · React · Vite · Tailwind · Axios
description: A two-part tool for job hunting: a FastAPI backend that scrapes job boards for postings matching configurable keywords and ranks them by relevance, paired with a React dashboard for reviewing results, discarding non-fits, and exporting a shortlist to Excel.

title: Developer Portfolio
subtitle: Personal website & project showcase
description: Responsive portfolio website showcasing projects in data, web development, and software engineering.

title: MoodFlow
subtitle: Mood & Weather-based To-Do App
description: To-do application adapting task suggestions based on mood and weather conditions.

title: Pokédex Explorer
subtitle: Dynamic Pokémon search interface using the PokéAPI
description: Responsive Pokédex with autocomplete search, animated stat bars, and dynamic theming.

title: Space Shooter Game (Galaga)
subtitle: Arcade-style desktop game built with Python
description: Arcade-style space shooter featuring enemy waves, collisions, and power-ups.

title: Todo App
subtitle: Minimal task manager
description: Simple desktop todo manager with add, complete, and delete functionality.
